title: Agent OS — Vision, Architecture, and Roadmap
summary: Design/vision document for an OS-style substrate that builds, isolates, enforces, and supervises invocation-scoped agents, with a release roadmap.
notes: Self-described as 'a structural plan, not a spec' that 'captures the decisions made during exploration.' Prose-heavy, explanatory, with embedded rationale and a release roadmap — DOC. Carries strong architectural reasoning and settled decisions (could read as ADR-like), but no Accepted status, no numbered ADR filename, and it bundles many decisions plus open questions rather than locking one — so classified DOC over ADR. Filename source-hash (3d8f6a2b) was assigned without a SHA tool available; verify if collision-sensitive.
